name: Delicious Creamy Zucchini Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the bottom of a pastry shell with mustard.
2. Bake in a 450 degree oven for 10 minutes. Cool.
3. Reduce oven heat to 350 degrees.
4. Place zucchini in colander, sprinkle with salt and drain for 5 minutes.
5. Sauté mushrooms in butter.
6. Sprinkle 1 cup of Jack cheese in the bottom of the pastry shell.
7. Spoon mushrooms on top.
8. Squeeze zucchini to remove excess moisture. Place in shell, separating and fluffing with fingers.
9. Beat together cream cheese, whipped cream, egg yolks, and egg, seasoning with salt and pepper.
10. Place the pastry dish on a baking sheet and carefully pour in the egg-cream mixture.
11. Sprinkle the remaining Jack cheese on top.
12. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 45 minutes, until the top is puffed and golden and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Let stand 5 minutes before cutting. Makes 6 servings.
